online.label: Online
online.headline: AVAILABLE
online.message: I'm currently active at my desk. It's a great time to reach out for a quick response.

holidays.label: On Leave
holidays.headline: ON VACATION
holidays.message: I'm currently away taking some time off. I'll get back to you as soon as I return.

offline.label: Offline
offline.headline: AWAY
offline.message: I'm currently not at my computer. Feel free to leave a message, I'll reply when I'm back.

status.howItWorksDescription: This status indicator is synced in real-time with my computer's activity. It lets you know if I'm currently at my desk and available to chat, or if I'm away and might take a bit longer to respond.

hero.description: Specialist in PostgreSQL and cloud-native infrastructure. I design high-availability clusters, automate critical operations, and deliver resilient architectures for systems that cannot stop.

story.paragraph1: Without availability, the system doesn't exist. Without performance, no one uses it. Without reliability, growth stops. I deliver systems built to scale with resilience and control.
story.paragraph2: Specialized in PostgreSQL and cloud-native infrastructure, I connect database, application, and environment efficiently — from high-availability clusters with Patroni to Python automation and API development with NestJS.
story.paragraph3: Businesses scale through people. I've mentored more than 10 professionals, because spreading technical knowledge within the team is as strategic a multiplier as any software delivery.

horus.title: Mid-Level PostgreSQL DBA
horus.description: Administration of PostgreSQL production environments, focused on high availability, performance tuning, and maintenance routine automation. Work in clusters with Patroni and Pgpool-II, including monitoring, failover, and continuous stability improvements.

present.title: Founder and Software Engineer
present.description: Technical leadership in cloud-native infrastructure R&D, evolving architectures from Docker Compose to Kubernetes (K3s/Rancher). Development of solutions focused on resilience, observability, and high availability in PostgreSQL.

idbrasil.title: Infrastructure and Data Engineer
idbrasil.description: Development of infrastructure and data engineering automation with Python, PostgreSQL, and MySQL. Deliveries in BI modeling, E2E testing, and SQL optimization with significant performance gains in critical queries.

tributech.title: Data Engineer and Technical Leadership
tributech.description: Worked in data engineering and geoprocessing with PostgreSQL/PostGIS, ETL, and integration automation. Built SQL/PLpgSQL solutions at scale and provided technical leadership in onboarding and mentoring over 10 professionals.

academic.title: Researcher (Thesis)
academic.description: Applied research in high-availability architectures with PostgreSQL, Patroni, etcd, and Pgpool-II, including failover analysis, distributed consensus, and resilience strategies.

education.title: Bachelor's Degree in Software Engineering
education.description: Education with a solid foundation in software architecture, requirements engineering, quality, development processes, and scalable system-building practices.

backend.title: BACKEND
backend.subtitle: Systems Architecture
backend.description: Robust and scalable APIs with clean code and a focus on maintainability.

devops.title: DEVOPS
devops.subtitle: Infrastructure and Delivery
devops.description: Reproducible infrastructure and continuous deployment for reliable environments.

data.title: Data & HA
data.subtitle: Critical Data Engineering
data.description: PostgreSQL architectures focused on performance, continuity, and high availability.

details.0: PostgreSQL HA / Patroni / etcd / Pgpool-II / PgBouncer
details.2: PL/pgSQL, data modeling, and SQL tuning
details.3: ETL with Pentaho and Apache Hop

footer.tagline: What can I do for you?

promptEngineered.title: How This Site Was Built
promptEngineered.subtitle: Built with AI, guided by human vision
promptEngineered.p1: Here's the thing — this entire website was created 100% by AI, but don't worry, I was following everything closely the whole time! Think of me as the director and AI as the talented crew bringing the vision to life.
promptEngineered.p2: Every line of code, every design decision, and every animation you see here was created through careful prompt engineering. I guided the process, refined the results, and ensured everything aligned with my vision — but the heavy lifting? That was all AI.
promptEngineered.p3: This entire project was built using <highlight>vibe coding</highlight> — that flow state where you go with the feeling, iterate in the moment, and let the creative process guide you. No rigid planning, just pure experimentation and refinement until it feels right.
promptEngineered.p4: It's pretty wild what becomes possible when you combine human creativity with AI capabilities. This site is proof of that collaboration — showing that with the right prompts, a clear vision, and a good vibe, you can build something truly special.
